name: io.github.gru-953/memorised-them-all
description: Local, token-free file → knowledge-graph memory for Claude. Convert any attachment to Markdown and digest it into a graph + exportable memory, entirely on-device.

environmentVariables.name: MTA_NO_OLLAMA
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to run fully offline (classical extraction + hashing embeddings; no model server).
